mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resumes WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM resumes WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = TRUE
SELECT * FROM resumes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM resumes WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND is_deleted = FALSE AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM resumes WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = FALSE AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM resumes WHERE is_deleted = TRUE AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM resumes ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resumes (user_id, title, full_name, email, phone, location, linkedin_url, github_url, personal_website, avatar_url, professional_summary, template_id, status, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{fullName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{location}, #{linkedinUrl}, #{githubUrl}, #{personalWebsite}, #{avatarUrl}, #{professionalSummary}, #{templateId}, #{status}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE resumes SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE resumes SET is_deleted = FALSE WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = TRUE
UPDATE resumes SET status = 'draft' WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'published'
UPDATE resumes SET status = 'published' WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'draft'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM resumes WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = TRUE
